untranslatable_reason: Signal requires precise measurement of pullback retracement percentage relative to prior impulse leg (requires custom impulse/retracement leg detection logic not available in standard indicators). Also requires three-push pattern detection and momentum divergence confirmation at specific price levels, which need multi-bar structural analysis beyond allowed indicators.
translation_notes: Translated core logic using trend confirmation (ADX > 25), price position relative to MA (pullback proximity), and RSI in non-extreme zones (pullback retracement zone). Exit on break of recent extremes mimics pullback low/high breach. However, the precise [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] retracement percentages (typically 38-62% Fibonacci levels), complete impulse/retracement/impulse structure validation, and momentum divergence detection cannot be accurately expressed with available indicators and require custom pattern recognition.
